title: Tropical Citrus Soda Advertising Poster AI
sourceTitle: Tropical Citrus Soda Advertising Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vivid tropical citrus soda advertising poster for SODA, built around bold summer refreshment energy and readable French commercial typography. Subject: A large transparent plastic bottle of golden-orange citrus soda sits slightly right of center, gently angled left, with a yellow cap, condensation droplets, sliced-citrus label, SODA, and aux agrumes d’été visible on the packaging. Scene: Sunny beach advertising world with brilliant blue sky, turquoise water, soft clouds, The bottle label displays sliced citrus fruit and the product name "Soda" alongside the phrase "aux agrumes d'été" and a tiny green "500 ml" indicator., palm-frond blur, water splashes, ice cubes, orange wedges, lime half, grapefruit half, and bright citrus foreground detail. Composition: Vertical product poster layout: bottle dominates the right-center, oversized headline block anchors the left, fruit and splash elements build the lower foreground, and small benefit icons stay organized in the lower-left column. Signature Elements: Transparent citrus bottle, French summer phrase, yellow brushstroke freshness badge, dramatic water splash, ice cubes, citrus slices, palm blur, and clean commercial poster hierarchy. Fixed source details: Background Scene: blurred palm shadows and sparkling pool water. Style: High-impact tropical beverage advertising with photoreal product rendering, glossy condensation, dynamic splash motion, polished commercial retouching, and energetic summer shelf appeal. Color Palette: Golden-orange soda, yellow cap and badge, white headline text, turquoise sea, bright blue sky, citrus green accents, and sunny beach highlights. Lighting: Brilliant summer daylight with sparkling bottle highlights, crisp condensation reflections, glowing soda color, and clean shadow separation across fruit, ice, and plastic. Typography: SUMMER POP appears as the large readable left-side headline; aux agrumes d’été appears as cursive or secondary copy; SODA appears on the bottle label with a tiny 500 ml detail and compact benefit-icon text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
